case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. NORTH BEACH PLACE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $191.00 FILED BY MCCLENDON, CHERI AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH PLACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH PLACE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH PLACE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
